description: The documentation describes modes as lowercase '"share"' and '"copy"' in the Modes section, but the WorkDirExtraPathMode enum (an UpperCaseStrEnum) only accepts uppercase values 'SHARE' and 'COPY'. Pydantic validation rejects lowercase input. Users following the prose description would get a confusing validation error. The TOML examples correctly use uppercase, but the bullet-point descriptions use lowercase.
